system.description:
Combat Medic is the Field Technician discipline for those who decided the most important asset on any job is a teammate still breathing. They trained in the trauma wings of contested cities, in the field hospitals of corporate brushfire wars, or as the unofficial patcher of choice for a crew that could not call a real ambulance. Their kit is meticulous: clotting foam, autoinjector arrays, neural-trauma resuscitation rigs they built themselves.

On the job, the Combat Medic is the runner who turns a near-fatal wound into a story the team will tell over drinks. Their entry feature is Trauma Protocol: as an action they may stabilize a downed ally and restore them to operational status with reduced HP, once per encounter without expending consumables.
system.grants: Trauma Protocol: once per encounter, free revive and stabilization of a downed ally.

wizard.tagline: Drag the crew back from the line that should have ended them
